name: rule-creator
description: Create production-ready Cursor rules following v3.0 schema by orchestrating template_generator.py and schema_validator.py
author: AI Coding Rules

workflow_phases.name: Discovery & Research
workflow_phases.description: Search RULES_INDEX.md, identify domain, research best practices

workflow_phases.name: Template Generation
workflow_phases.description: Execute template_generator.py to create rule structure

workflow_phases.name: Content Population
workflow_phases.description: Fill metadata and all required sections with researched content

workflow_phases.name: Validation Loop
workflow_phases.description: Run schema_validator.py, fix errors, iterate until 0 CRITICAL

workflow_phases.name: Indexing
workflow_phases.description: Add rule to RULES_INDEX.md in correct numeric position
